div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
1. 1. Architect writes the
initiative manifest to
pending/

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
2. 2. Scheduler claims it
(atomic rename to in-flight)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
3. 3. Spawns a git worktree
from the project repo

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
6. 6. Ralph + unifier build,
commit, run the quality gate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
7. 7. Review phase opens the
demo-embedded PR

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
10. 10. Closure moves the
manifest to done/

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
12. 12. brain-ingest writes
new themes + the cycle
archive

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
The single human running
forge across side projects.
Touches the system at exactly
three points: architect (idea
-> initiative), review
(engage the PR), reflection
(feedback).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Anthropic's agent runtime +
harness (model calls, tool
use, prompt caching). Every
forge agent runs here; forge
hosts no model runtime,
vector DB, or harness of its
own.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Hosts the managed-project
repos. The PR is the
operator's sole review +
merge surface; merge state is
the single terminal signal.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
A side-project git repo forge
develops (trafficGame,
terraform-provider-betterado,
claude-harness...). Has its
own quality gate and its own
Brain 3. Worktrees branch
from it.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
The operator's OWN Claude
Code session. The three human
moments run here as slash
commands (/forge-architect,
/forge-review,
/forge-reflect) - never
forge-spawned agents - and
hand off to forge via files.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
The hot path: a persistent
scheduler that claims
initiatives and runs them
through five in-cycle phases,
isolated per git worktree,
recoverable by heartbeat.
Caps its own surface area by
design (ADRs 011-013).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
The Claude Code skill catalog
- forge's agent surface. Each
skill is a system prompt +
tool policy the engine loads
into an SDK query(). Brain
skills are the brain's
read/write API.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Filesystem state machine of
initiative manifests: pending
-> in-flight ->
ready-for-review -> done |
failed. Atomic rename
transitions; heartbeat files
enable crash recovery. done/
implies MERGED.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
A Karpathy-style LLM wiki
rendered as an Obsidian
vault, in three scopes. Each
scope has _raw/ (immutable),
themes/ (~15-60 line pages),
category indexes, and a
graphify graph.
